title: Beta Accuracy
description: Makes your game look and feel like Beta 1.7.3 without compromises.
body:
## Why?
There are no complete **Beta 1.7.3** resource packs for **Minecraft 1.12.2** (probably), so i decided to make one! I also made sure to change many new textures and models to match old ones.
## Features
### Restored
- Textures
- Sounds
- Models
- Lighting
- Small things you wouldn't notice
- Old names (Only Russian and English (US) )
### Removed
- New sounds and subtitles for them
- New particles
- Leaf shadowing
### Changed
- Food
- Boats
- Doors
- Etc
### Addons
  - Alpha Accuracy (Must be placed above main pack)
  - Beta Colormap for vanilla worlds
  - Mod support ([Oceanic Expanse](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceanic-expanse), [Cherry_on_1.12.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherry_on_1.12.2), [Unseen's Nether Backport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unseens-nether-backport))
## Best works with
- Mipmap levels off
- [Modern Beta Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-beta-forge) which adds old world gen
- [OSECA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/old-swing) which accurately replicates old lighting and more!
## [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) is required!
